_comment: TEMPLATE (FRAMEWORK.md §C11.6). A plugin bundles your capability layer (skills + commands + agents + hooks + MCP) behind one versioned, namespaced manifest so it is installable across projects — the literal mechanism for 'make this framework repeatable for other projects'. Place this file at <plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. Replace placeholders and delete the _comment and _layout keys (they are documentation, not schema).
name: <plugin-name>
